# netbox_platforms (Data Source)

Fetches a list of platforms from Netbox.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all platforms.
data "netbox_platforms" "all" {}

# Filter by name.
data "netbox_platforms" "filtered" {
  name = "Example Platform"
}

# Output the name of the first platform, or a message if no platforms are found.
output "first_platform_name" {
  value = length(data.netbox_platforms.all.platforms) > 0 ? data.netbox_platforms.all.platforms[0].name : "No platforms found"
}

# Output the total number of platforms found.
output "platform_count" {
  value = length(data.netbox_platforms.all.platforms)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `custom_field_filters` (Map of String) Filter platforms by custom field values. Keys are custom field names, values are the filter values.
- `manufacturer_id` (Number) Filter by manufacturer ID.
- `name` (String) Filter by platform name.
- `slug` (String) Filter by platform slug.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Placeholder identifier for the data source.
- `platforms` (Attributes List) List of platforms. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--platforms))

<a id="nestedatt--platforms"></a>
### Nested Schema for `platforms`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Description for the platform.
- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the platform.
- `manufacturer_id` (Number) The ID of the manufacturer associated with this platform.
- `name` (String) Name of the platform.
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly unique shorthand for the platform.
